objective: Attempt to disprove the accepted release-9 Worker result and staged patch 98d650c6, emphasizing optional-versus-required disposition semantics, lifecycle blockers, public envelope projections, and compatibility readers.

decision_frame.value: Disprove semantically false or structurally invalid v1 context-failure and decision-envelope output before fan-in.
decision_frame.why_now: A consequential review plan requires fresh independent QA bound to the same target and current staged patch after the release-9 Worker accepted the repaired matrix.
acceptance_criteria: Verify target and patch bindings plus accepted Worker result SHA-256 15adb3eef736a82ed7d0c0cdea9fd24b8a1d34959ff71ea689b99ba817ab0564.

Exercise all nine required disposition cases: optional missing, provider-unavailable, unresolved-host-path, historical, superseded, access-denied, stale-digest, and required provider-unavailable and unresolved-host-path.
Verify the canonical failure code, blocker or contextUnknown projection, exact stop or continue condition, schema and semantic validation, and legacy-reader compatibility for every case.
Return accepted only if no reproducible source or contract defect remains; otherwise reject with assertion-shaped evidence.
dependencies: Fresh accepted Worker result release9-worker-result.json SHA-256 15adb3eef736a82ed7d0c0cdea9fd24b8a1d34959ff71ea689b99ba817ab0564.
Implementation note .harness/implementation-notes/2026-07-20-synaipse-cc2-optional-missing-contract-ratification.md records the ratified optional missing and lifecycle compatibility boundary.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: Find hidden contradictions between requirement-aware resolution state, canonical failure code, recovery, public decision envelope, and legacy contextUnknowns compatibility.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One fresh read-only QA Disproof lane.

review_plan.adversarial_review_rationale: Public versioned decision behavior and a compatibility migration require an independent adversarial pass after QA.

non_goals: Do not edit source, stage, commit, push, mutate hosted state, or infer later-lane readiness.
Do not treat Worker evidence, QA evidence, or this packet as hosted review, acceptance, merge, release, or production readiness.

validation_entrypoints: pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/synaipse/context-contract.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/context-plane.test.ts src/lib/decision/harness-decision.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts src/dev/validate-harness-decision-failures.test.ts src/dev/runtime-packet-example-parity.test.ts --maxWorkers=1 --reporter=dot

delegated_decision_rights: Run read-only QA disproof and write only declared QA artifacts.
